Component.name: Find Char 2 OR common name as code
Find Char 2 AND common name contains code
All rows after delete add and modify

Script.name: Log it

Connector.name: Find Char 2 OR common name as code
Find Char 2 AND common name contains code

AttributeMapItem.Name: COMMON NAME
AttributeMapItem.Script: oldCN + " >> Modified by TDI at " + new java.util.Date()

Hook.name: before_add
Hook.Name: before_add
Hook.Script: throw new java.lang.Exception("No row found to modify")

Loop.name: All rows after delete add and modify

Connector.name: All rows after delete add and modify

Branch.name: All rows after delete add and modify

Script.name: Log it_1
EmptyScript
Log it

Script.name: Log it

modifiedBy="eddiehartman" version="7.1.1"> <Form name="Form"> <ModTime>1780237839210</ModTime> <FormItemNames> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.script</ListItem> <ListItem>keepGlobalState</ListItem> <ListItem>sheetName</ListItem> <ListItem>sheetIndex</ListItem> <ListItem>skipHeader</ListItem> <ListItem>startRow</ListItem> <ListItem>endRow</ListItem> <ListItem>columnMappings</ListItem> <ListItem>uniqueKeyColumn</ListItem> <ListItem>writeMode</ListItem> <ListItem>createIfNotExists</ListItem> <ListItem>dateFormat</ListItem> <ListItem>caseSensitiveSearch</ListItem> </FormItemNames> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>File Configuration</ListItem> <ListItem>Sheet Configuration</ListItem> <ListItem>Data Configuration</ListItem> <ListItem>Write Configuration</ListItem> <ListItem>Advanced</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <FormItem name="caseSensitiveSearch"> <ModTime>1780237839210</ModTime> <parameter name="description">If the Link Criteria is case sensitive or not</parameter> <parameter name="label">Case Sensitive Search</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">boolean</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="columnMappings"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <parameter name="Required">true</parameter> <parameter name="description">Column to attribute mappings in format: A:firstName,B:lastName,C:email</parameter> <parameter name="label">Column Mappings</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">textarea</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="createIfNotExists"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Create Excel file if it doesn't exist (for write operations)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Create If Not Exists</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">boolean</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="dateFormat"> <ModTime>1780237833663</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Date format pattern (e.g., yyyy-MM-dd)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Date Format</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">string</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="endRow"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Last row to process (-1 for all rows)</parameter> <parameter name="label">End Row</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">string</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="excelFilePath"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <parameter name="Required">true</parameter> <parameter name="description">Full path to the Excel XLSX file</parameter> <parameter name="label">Excel File Path</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">string</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="includePrologs"> <ModTime>1780237689013</ModTime> <parameter name="description">List of Scripts to process when Connector initializes</parameter> <parameter name="label">Include Prologs</parameter> <parameter name="script">selectGlobalProlog</parameter> <parameter name="scriptLabel">pro_script_label</parameter> <parameter name="scripthelp">pro_script_help</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">textarea</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="keepGlobalState"> <parameter name="description">SCRIPT_CONN_KEEP_GLOBAL_STATE_DESC</parameter> <parameter name="label">SCRIPT_CONN_KEEP_GLOBAL_STATE_LABEL</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">boolean</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="sheetIndex"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Sheet index (0-based) if sheetName is not specified</parameter> <parameter name="label">Sheet Index</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">string</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="sheetName"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Name of the sheet to process (takes precedence over sheetIndex)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Sheet Name</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">string</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="skipHeader"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Skip the first row (header row)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Skip Header Row</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">boolean</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="startRow"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <parameter name="description">First row to process (0-based, after header if skipHeader is true)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Start Row</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">string</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="uniqueKeyColumn"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Column letter to use as unique key (e.g., A). If not specified, row number is used.</parameter> <parameter name="label">Unique Key Column</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">string</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="writeMode"> <ModTime>1780237622999</ModTime> <Values> <ListItem>append</ListItem> <ListItem>overwrite</ListItem> <ListItem>update</ListItem> </Values> <parameter name="description">Write mode: append (add new rows), overwrite (replace file), update (modify existing rows)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Write Mode</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">droplist</parameter> </FormItem> <FormSection name="Advanced"> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>keepGlobalState</ListItem> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.includeFiles</ListItem> <ListItem>includePrologs</ListItem> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.debug</ListItem> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.userComment</ListItem> <ListItem>dateFormat</ListItem> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.script</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> <parameter name="title">Advanced</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="Data Configuration"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>skipHeader</ListItem> <ListItem>startRow</ListItem> <ListItem>endRow</ListItem> <ListItem>columnMappings</ListItem> <ListItem>uniqueKeyColumn</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="title">Data Configuration</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="File Configuration"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>excelFilePath</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="title">File Configuration</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="Sheet Configuration"> <ModTime>1741878000000</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>sheetName</ListItem> <ListItem>sheetIndex</ListItem> <ListItem>caseSensitiveSearch</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="title">Sheet Configuration</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="Write Configuration</parameter> </FormSection> <parameter name="title">Excel XLSX Connector</parameter> <TranslationFile>NLS/idi_conn_excelxlsx</TranslationFile> </Form> </MetamergeConfig>

A:Project ID,B:Cost Code,C:Trans Code,D:Trans Type,E:Vendor Name,F:Invoice Number,G:Date,H:Amount
